features.evidence: alt+tab tooks a while to work and so did the windows button. Every windows update breaks something else in the software.
Excellent sound, graphics and gameplay. The speakers are ok, and the mic quality according to my friends sound like an Xbox 360 mic so you may want to invest in a decent headset.

never got any notifications about the computer over heating though.poor quality control and weirdness on battery. After unplugging the battery and plugging it back in, the PC would not turn on for about 30 minutes at all.
It'll run things fine on power and if you can get one without the line on the screen. The IPS screen looks very nice, and mine came with very minimal IPS bleed.
The Alienware command center app is a RAM hog. we are heading into a world where RAM is being logged by all types of bloatware so 64g is becoming the go-to.
Very nice performance. The "Gaming mode" button that turns on turbo performance is also reportedly responsible for frying people's CPUs.
may have been over heating or something. never got any notifications about the computer over heating though.poor quality control and weirdness on battery.

These problems can be circumvented if you do a fresh windows install and install a 3rd party app yo control the fans as the dell software is horrible for fan control. Don't complain that it'll be too loud because you'll most likely be wearing headphones.

Its a great laptop for the price. All of this being said, you get a solid piece of machinery and graphic power for the price and if taken care of, can last quite a while before needing to upgrade to the next best thing.
so I just use Bluetooth for external sound with it now.
